ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" INTEGER /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry" INTEGER /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "exchange" INTEGER /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was initially offered to the public */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the company's logo */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this data belongs to */,
  "prev_close" REAL /* Previous closing price of the stock */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "last" REAL /* Last price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume weighted average price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Total turnover of the stock */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades */,
  "deliverable_volume" INTEGER /* Deliverable volume of the stock */,
  "deliverable_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of deliverable volume */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time when the data was recorded */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of all stocks in the sector */,
  "num_companies" INTEGER /* Number of companies in the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of all stocks in the industry */,
  "num_companies" INTEGER /* Number of companies in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stock_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access was granted */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stock_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stock_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_notes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this alert belongs to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this metric belongs to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., return, volatility) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was calculated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who calculated the performance metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the performance data (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this prediction belongs to */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Text of the prediction */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the prediction */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to make the prediction (e.g., machine learning, expert analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
